utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Each requires specification with costs. The plan provides monthly_costs for health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services, and total_budget includes total_monthly_cost and total_annual_cost. Descriptions align with required coverage types (physical and mental health; home/contents; travel; enhancement services). Thus, all items are fully specified with required details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three items: PrimeCare Premium Plan under health_coverage, EliteHome Premium Coverage under property_coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan under travel_coverage. Using the ground-truth ratings, these exact plan names appear with ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan (health physical and mental) rated 10, EliteHome Premium Coverage rated 10, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan rated 10. Therefore, each selected item maps to rating 10.
